case_title: ANGELAI JAN LENG VS. TYRONE CHAN,DDS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENG, ANGELAI JAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN,DDS, TYRONE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA BRACE YOURSELF JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
